snippet.title: NJIH DVE SVAKI DAN PEЕ KE PREДҗU 15km ZAJEDNO:TeЕЎka Еҫivotna priДҚa devojДҚice Milice i njenog psa Lare
snippet.description:
Nova epizoda serijala вҖһ300 ДҚudaвҖң donela je zanimljive priДҚe o ljubavi i lepoti. Ne kaЕҫu uzalud da je pas najbolji ДҚovekov prijatelj. Ta ljubav je neizmerna, jaka i bezuslovna, a vernost psa ne moЕҫe da se meri ni sa ДҚim.  U KurЕЎumlijskom planinskom selu Konjuva, svakoga jutra pre zore, Milica Rackov (15) kreДҮe peЕЎke put ЕЎkole u susedno selo Barbatovac. Treba peЕЎaДҚiti po mrazu, snegu ili kiЕЎi do autobuske stanice, udaljene nekoliko kilometara od kuДҮe. Autobusom stiЕҫe do ЕЎkole udaljene oko 15 kilometara. Kada se desi da autobusa nema, Milica prepeЕЎaДҚi u oba smera ukupno 30 kilometara. Sve vreme je verno prati i satima ДҚeka keruЕЎa Lara.

#Еҫivotna priДҚa #kurir #kurirTelevizija

snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode moЕҫete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak priДҚe o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" priДҚa o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaЕЎa ДҚiji postupci se i dan danas prepriДҚavaju. Na ДҚelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih Еҫestokih momaka sa naЕЎih prostora, zaДҚetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir MagaЕЎ, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. PraviДҚan, patriota pomalo preke naravi reЕЎavao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anД‘eo ДҚuvar dok je za ove druge bio noДҮna mora, a gnev i jaДҚinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odliДҚno pamtili. ЕҪivotni put Ljubomira MagaЕЎa i druЕҫine koju je okupio oko sebe, moЕҫe se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbriЕҫnih deДҚaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovДҚega. SaznaДҮemo na koje sve skrivene i javne naДҚine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih dogaД‘aja iz njegovog Еҫivota. ДҢuДҮemo i svedoДҚanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristiДҚkih akcionih filmova.

Posetite naЕЎ sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
MoЕҫete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
MoЕҫete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

snippet.description:
izvrЕЎni producent: Дҗ. ДҗOGANI
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
рҹҺ§ BUY/LISTEN ON:
Deezer --- COMING SOON
Spotify  --- COMING SOON

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

рҹ“І  Booking manager: +381 63 206 422 
рҹ“© djogani.djole@gmail.com

рҹ‘ү Fan page --- https://www.facebook.com/Djoganifans/вҖӢ 
рҹ‘ү Facebook --- https://www.facebook.com/djogani.grupaвҖӢ 
рҹ‘ү Instagram --- https://www.instagram.com/djoganivesnaвҖӢ 

Subscribe to Channel Дҗogani:  https://www.youtube.com/c/grupaДҗOGANIofficial
UkljuДҚi рҹ”” da dobijaЕЎ obaveЕЎtenja za sve nove pesme!
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom. 
First, can someone who's been vaccinated 
still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim kuДҮi cele noДҮi maskiran
Svetom vlada ДҚudna epidemija
ДҢekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piЕЎe LOCK DOWN,
VidiЕЎ na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ДҚini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ДҚekamo
Da me grliЕЎ hoДҮu jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

SluЕЎaj malo doktore na vestima
Е ta ДҮe dalje biti baЕЎ me zanima
ДҢekaj, hani, hani, da proД‘u ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
JoЕЎ samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reДҚ
PuniДҚemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i BeДҚ.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je Дҗole Дҗogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je ЕЎto smo sami,
Ne moЕҫemo vani
Zato doД‘i meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaЕЎ mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zahvaljujemo se:
рҹҺө Antonu
рҹҺө Marku D.
рҹҺө ЕҪiki P.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Mladen ima 32 registrirana old timera 4K
snippet.description:
Mladen CvitanoviДҮ iz Golubinje kod ЕҪepДҚa poznat je po tome ЕЎto je prvi Bosanac koji je kupio vlak i vagone kako bi napravio turistiДҚku atrakciju. Lokomotiva i vagoni su u ispravnom stanju. MeД‘utim on je pravi Kralj old timera jer u svojoj kolekciji ima 32 registrirana old timera. Imao je u svojoj kolekciji i Cadillac Elvisa Presleya ali ga je mijenjao za Renault Primaquatre iz 1936. godine. To je kako Mladen tvrdi jedini automobil na svijetu koji je  registriran i nalazi se u njegovoj kolekciji. Mladen pored old timera kupuje i kuДҮe, zemljiЕЎta,  ЕЎume.. Tako je u svome mjestu kupio cijelo selo.  Ljudi su odlazili u svijet a Mladen je kupovao njihove kuДҮe i imanja. Danas sadi voДҮe, uzgaja ovce, kokoЕЎi. Zanimljivo je napomenuti da Mladen ima poloЕҫen ispit za pilota. Vozio je avione i helikoptere ali nikada nije vozio traktor. Pogledajte priДҚu koja vas moЕҫe nadahnuti i podstaknuti da krenete u neki biznis.
PridruЕҫite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

en.title: Mladen has 32 registered old timers, 4K video
en.description: Mladen CvitanoviДҮ from Golubinja near ЕҪepДҚe is known for being the first Bosnian to buy a train and carriages to make a tourist attraction. The locomotive and wagons are in good condition. However, he is the real King of old timers because he has 32 registered old timers in his collection. He also had Elvis Presley's Cadillac in his collection but changed it for a 1936 Renault Primaquatre. This is how Mladen claims to be the only car in the world that is registered and is in his collection. In addition to the old timer, Mladen also buys houses, land, forests ... So he bought the whole village in his place. People went out into the world and Mladen bought their houses and properties. Today he plants fruits, raises sheep and chickens. It is interesting to note that Mladen has passed the pilot exam. He drove airplanes and helicopters, but never drove a tractor. Take a look at a story that can inspire and encourage you to start a business.

GlumaДҚko-voditeljski par NataЕЎa AksentijeviДҮ i Predrag PeД‘a DamnjanoviДҮ vas uvode u svet pop kulture. Sa gostima priДҚaju o zabavnim sadrЕҫajima, umetnosti i aktuelnim deЕЎavanjima u svetu i kod nas. Uz pomoДҮ benda i kroz zabavne igre zajedno sa gostima se zabavljaju na dinamiДҚan i upeДҚatljiv naДҚin.

U kakvim je trenutno odnosima s ModriДҮem, Е ukerom i Bjelicom, javljaju li mu se uopДҮe bivЕЎi igraДҚi, kako su izgledali pregovori s Danielom Levyjem i Florentinom Perezom, ЕЎto kaЕҫe za sluДҚaj Majana DabiДҮa, odnos s BBB-ima i medijima u zadnjih 15 godina, je li ovo sa sucima tek poДҚetak? snippet.title: Danijela Е tajnfeld za Insajder: Htela sam da izbegnem da otkrijem ime, ali je jedna kap prelila ДҚaЕЎu
snippet.description:
вҖңMene je silovao moj kolega i dragi prijatelj Branislav LeДҚiДҮ, u maju 2012. godine. Posle ДҚetiri dana igrali smo predstavu. Bila sam u ЕЎoku. Htela sam odmah da zovem policiju, ali sam razmiЕЎljala ЕЎta ДҮe se desiti. Morate da razumete to stanjeвҖң, kaЕҫe u ekskluzivnom intervjuu za Insajder glumica Danijela Е tajnfeld.
Danijela Е tajnfeld je iz Njujorka gde Еҫivi veДҮ godinama, doputovala u Beograd kako bi dala izjavu tuЕҫilaЕЎtvu, a u opЕЎirnoj ispovesti za Insajder glumica prvi put pred kamerama opisuje sam dogaД‘aj koji se odigrao u maju 2012. 
https://bit.ly/3lJnwRh

snippet.title: KardeЕҹlerim 7. BГ¶lГјm
snippet.description:
7.BГ¶lГјm Г–zeti: 
 вҖңBiraz umut ekmiЕҹtim Еҹuraya, sГ¶kГјp atmДұЕҹlar usulcaвҖҰвҖқ
Nebahat ЕҹantajДұyla AkifвҖҷi alt edeceДҹini dГјЕҹГјnГјrken, Akif NebahatвҖҷДұ ters kГ¶Еҹe yapma planlarДұ iГ§indedir. SuzanвҖҷДұn dГјЕҹmesiyle yaЕҹanan beklenmedik sonuГ§ HarikaвҖҷnДұn annesinin geГ§miЕҹiyle ilgili yeni bir Еҹey daha Г¶Дҹrenmesine sebep olur. KadirвҖҷin SГјsenвҖҷle olan arkadaЕҹlДұДҹДұ, MelisaвҖҷya hayal kДұrДұklДұДҹДұ yaЕҹatДұrken; Berk, bunu fДұrsata Г§evirmeye Г§alДұЕҹДұr. Nebahat, Akif tarafДұndan oyuna getirilince yaЕҹadДұДҹДұ Г¶fke dГ¶nГјlmez sonuГ§lar doДҹururken, AsiyeвҖҷyi bekleyen felaket herkese bГјyГјk korku yaЕҹatДұr.

KardeЕҹlerim kanalДұna abone olmak iГ§in; https://bit.ly/3oKfCa7

Tek dertleri hayat mГјcadelesi olan dГ¶rt kardeЕҹin iГ§ burkan, sevgi dolu hikГўyesiвҖҰ 

BaЕҹrollerini Celil NalГ§akan, Halit Г–zgГјr SarДұ, CГјneyt Mete, Fadik Sevin Atasoy, Ahu YaДҹtu ve Simge SelГ§ukвҖҷun paylaЕҹtДұДҹДұ KardeЕҹlerim, herkese ve her Еҹeye raДҹmen kopmayan, dГјЕҹtГјkГ§e birbirine tutunup yeniden ayaДҹa kalkan genГ§lerin umut dolu Г¶ykГјsГјnГј ekrana getiriyor.

atv resmi YouTube kanalДұna abone olmak iГ§in; https://bit.ly/2Pddn3r

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy вҖ“ Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max вҖ“ July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovieвҖӢ
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/вҖӢ
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/вҖӢ
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event вҖңSpace Jam: A New Legacy,вҖқ from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.вҖҷs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as youвҖҷve never seen them before.  ItвҖҷs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBronвҖҷs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even вҖңKingвҖқ James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the вҖңAvengersвҖқ films, вҖңHotel RwandaвҖқ), Khris Davis (вҖңJudas and the Black Messiah,вҖқ TVвҖҷs вҖңAtlantaвҖқ), Sonequa Martin-Green (TVвҖҷs вҖңThe Walking Dead,вҖқ вҖңStar Trek: DiscoveryвҖқ), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (вҖңLooney Tunes CartoonsвҖқ), Eric Bauza (вҖңLooney Tunes CartoonsвҖқ), and Zendaya (upcoming вҖңDune,вҖқ вҖңMalcolm & MarieвҖқ).

Lee (вҖңGirls Trip,вҖқ вҖңNight SchoolвҖқ) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The filmвҖҷs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The directorвҖҷs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (вҖңSpider-Man: HomecomingвҖқ), animation producer Troy Nethercott (вҖңWonder ParkвҖқ), production designers Kevin Ishioka (вҖңThe MuleвҖқ), Akin McKenzie (NetflixвҖҷs вҖңWhen They See UsвҖқ) and Clint Wallace (upcoming вҖңEternalsвҖқ), editor Bob Ducsay (вҖңGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вҖқ вҖңStar Wars Episode VIII вҖ“ The Last JediвҖқ) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (вҖңRampage,вҖқ вҖңWar for the Planet of the ApesвҖқ).  The music is by Kris Bowers (вҖңGreenbook,вҖқ NetflixвҖҷs вҖңBridgertonвҖқ).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, вҖңSpace Jam: A New Legacy.вҖқ  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.title: Emanet 147. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 147 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

WeвҖҷve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and heвҖҷs lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet youвҖҷll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well itвҖҷs not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? YouвҖҷll have to keep watching to find out!

snippet.title: NAJLEPЕ I SLANI ROLAT/Toliko lagan za pojesti a i za napraviti/SpanaДҮ ili blitva/OduЕЎeviДҮe sve goste.
snippet.description:
Slani rolat od spanaДҮa i sira za ДҚas gotov. VaЕЎa trpeza ДҮe da zablista!
PISANI RECEPT: http://www.serpica.net/2021/04/slani-rolat-od-spanaca-i-sira.html
- 150 gr. spanaДҮa ili blitve
- 5 jaja
- 5 kaЕЎika mleka
- 5 kaЕЎika ulja
- 100 gr. braЕЎna
- 1 kaЕЎiДҚica praЕЎka za pecivo
- 1 kaЕЎiДҚica soli
- biber
- 200 gr. kaДҚkavlja
Za premaz:
- 5 kaЕЎika kisele pavlake
- 1 kaЕЎika majoneza
- prstohvat soli
- 1 kaЕЎiДҚica kurkume (ako volite)

- perЕЎunov list, miroД‘ija za dekoraciju
180 C, 20 min, 30x25cm

RAZNI RECEPTI - BIRAJTE

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO sa RR - BAKA PRASE : TERETE ME JER SAM MNOGO JAKA GLAVA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Bogdan Ilic, poznatiji kao, Baka Prase! Kako je poceo da snima, kakve probleme donosi popularnost, o dramama i hapsenju, pricace sa mnom u danasnjoj epizodi!
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

Pavlezi: https://www.instagram.com/pavlezi.mp3/

snippet.title: NeЕЎto novo i prelepo! Farbanje jaja za Uskrs sa step sokovima za ДҚas! Easter eggs.
snippet.description:
Farbanje uskrЕЎnjih jaja na ovaj naДҚin je fantazija, lako, brzo, prelepo. Boje mogu biti pastelne, neЕҫne a mogu i intezivnije. Kako ko voli. Ja volim da ima i jednih i drugih, mada ove neЕҫnije su mi draЕҫe.
#uskrsnjajaja #farbanjejaja #Easter
bojenje jaja
jaja za uskrs
novo
serpica recepti
serpica uskrЕЎnja jaja

Na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/farbanje-jaja-za-uskrs-sa-step-sokom.html

IZBELJIVANJE JAJA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rffoDA9kHW4

DEKUPAЕҪ - SA SALVETAMA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RYcPeUa01YA

JAJA NA PARI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=go92uwCASi4

SVETLUCAVA JAJA U VINU: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i_m8kWH8gIg

FARBANJE JAJA U LUKOVINI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7QSARBHTw-c
***********************************************************************
Kupite praЕЎkasti sok od jagode (ili rum punДҚa, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronaДҮi joЕЎ koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odliДҚno.

Jedna kesica (10 gr.) je dovoljna za 10 komada jaja.

Jaja operite i mokrim sunД‘erom skinite peДҚat ako ima.

Stavite jaja u ЕЎerpicu, nalijte vodu da prekrije, dodajte pola kaЕЎiДҚice soli.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji Еҫelite. NiЕЎta ne meЕЎajte, sok ДҮe se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za neЕҫniju boju, rozu jaja drЕҫite kraДҮe u soku.

Istresite teДҚnost i jaja stavite na radnu povrЕЎinu da se osuЕЎe, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih premaЕҫite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

Е to se tiДҚe Еҫutih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorandЕҫe, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirДҮetu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.
Ako nemate step sok moЕҫe bilo koji drugi.
RAZNI RECEPTI - BIRAJTE

Ispod videa kliknite na Like i Subscribe, komentarisite, napisite vase utiske, vase ideje, na koji nacin vi pripremate neko jelo, pecivo, kolac, tortu...
Svi komentari koji vredjaju autora i pratioce bice uklonjeni bez dalje rasprave. Ovo je kulturan youtub program, sa korisnim sadrzajem, ima i mladih i onih malo starijih tako da budimo ljubazni. I bez politike molim! Ima toliko tema o kojima mozemo pisati, u prvom planu su recepti iz nasih kuhinjica uz to se mozemo i druziti, caskati uz kaficu.

sr.title: NeЕЎto novo i prelepo! Farbanje jaja za Uskrs sa step sokovima za ДҚas! Easter eggs.
sr.description:
Farbanje uskrЕЎnjih jaja na ovaj naДҚin je fantazija, lako, brzo, prelepo. Boje mogu biti pastelne, neЕҫne a mogu i intezivnije. Kako ko voli. Ja volim da ima i jednih i drugih, mada ove neЕҫnije su mi draЕҫe.
#uskrsnjajaja #farbanjejaja #Easter
bojenje jaja
jaja za uskrs
novo
serpica recepti
serpica uskrЕЎnja jaja

Na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/farbanje-jaja-za-uskrs-sa-step-sokom.html

IZBELJIVANJE JAJA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rffoDA9kHW4

DEKUPAЕҪ - SA SALVETAMA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RYcPeUa01YA

JAJA NA PARI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=go92uwCASi4

SVETLUCAVA JAJA U VINU: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i_m8kWH8gIg

FARBANJE JAJA U LUKOVINI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7QSARBHTw-c
***********************************************************************
Kupite praЕЎkasti sok od jagode (ili rum punДҚa, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronaДҮi joЕЎ koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odliДҚno.

Jedna kesica (10 gr.) je dovoljna za 10 komada jaja.

Jaja operite i mokrim sunД‘erom skinite peДҚat ako ima.

Stavite jaja u ЕЎerpicu, nalijte vodu da prekrije, dodajte pola kaЕЎiДҚice soli.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji Еҫelite. NiЕЎta ne meЕЎajte, sok ДҮe se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za neЕҫniju boju, rozu jaja drЕҫite kraДҮe u soku.

Istresite teДҚnost i jaja stavite na radnu povrЕЎinu da se osuЕЎe, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih premaЕҫite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

Е to se tiДҚe Еҫutih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorandЕҫe, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirДҮetu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.
Ako nemate step sok moЕҫe bilo koji drugi.

it.title: Dipingi le uova senza sostanze chimiche nel modo originale - abbastanza naturale
it.description:
La Pasqua si avvicina, quindi ecco il primo video di quest'anno per dipingere le uova. Dipingi le uova nel modo originale senza l'uso di prodotti chimici, abbastanza naturalmente. AffinchГ© l'uovo abbia questo effetto, ГЁ meglio usare il bianco, quindi all'inizio del video puoi vedere come sbiancare un normale uovo giallo.

INGREDIENTI PER SBIANCARE L'UOVO
500 ml di acqua
400 ml di aceto alcolico

INGREDIENTI PER VERNICIARE LE UOVA
80 g di tГЁ all'ibisco
1 cucchiaino di aceto (alcolico o vino)
acqua bollita
+ un filo d'olio per ricoprire

ro.title: VopsiИӣi ouДғ fДғrДғ substanИӣe chimice Г®n mod original - destul de natural / VopsiИӣi ouДғ de PaИҷte
ro.description:
PaИҷtele se apropie, aИҷa cДғ iatДғ primul videoclip pentru acest an pentru vopsirea ouДғlor. VopsiИӣi ouДғle Г®n modul original, fДғrДғ a folosi substanИӣe chimice, destul de natural. Pentru ca oul sДғ obИӣinДғ acest efect, cel mai bine este sДғ folosiИӣi albul, aИҷa cДғ la Г®nceputul videoclipului puteИӣi vedea cum sДғ albiИӣi un ou galben obiИҷnuit.

INGREDIENTE DE ALBITURARE A OUAUELOR
500 ml de apДғ
400 ml oИӣet alcoolic

INGREDIENTE PENTRU VOPSEA DE OUДӮ
80 g ceai de hibiscus
1 linguriИӣДғ de oИӣet (alcoolic sau vin)
apa fiarta
+ puИӣin ulei pentru acoperire

de.title: Malen Sie Eier ohne Chemikalien auf die ursprГјngliche Art und Weise - ganz natГјrlich
de.description:
Ostern steht vor der TГјr, daher hier das erste Video fГјr dieses Jahr zum Malen von Eiern. Malen Sie die Eier auf natГјrliche Weise ohne Verwendung von Chemikalien, ganz natГјrlich. Damit das Ei diesen Effekt erzielt, ist es am besten, WeiГҹ zu verwenden. Am Anfang des Videos kГ¶nnen Sie sehen, wie ein gewГ¶hnliches gelbes Ei weiГҹ wird.

EI WHITENING ZUTATEN
500 ml Wasser
400 ml alkoholischer Essig

ZUTATEN ZUM MALEN VON EIEREN
80 g Hibiskus-Tee
1 TeelГ¶ffel Essig (Alkoholiker oder Wein)
Gekochtes Wasser
+ etwas Г–l zum Beschichten

ar.title: ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҒШ§ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩӮШ© 90 Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩҶ 2
ar.description: ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҲЩҒШ§ШҢ ЩҠШӘЩҶШ§ЩҲЩ„ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ЩӮШөШ© "ЩҠЩ„Щ…Ш§ШІ" Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШ¬Ш§ШІЩҒ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҜШ®ЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШіШ¬ЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ¬Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӯШЁ ЩҲЩӮШөШ© "ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш©" Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҠШӯЩғЩ… Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮШ§ ШЁШІШ§ЩҲШ¬ ШӘШ№ЩҠШі Щ…Ш№ ШҙШ®Шө Щ„Ш§ ШӘШӯШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ¬Щ„ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШЁЩӮЩү Ш§Щ„ШұШ¬Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШӘШӯШЁЩҮ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩӮЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠШ§Ш© Щ…ЩҲШ¶ЩҲШ№Ш§ Щ„ЩҮ. ШҘЩҶ ШӯШЁ ЩҠЩ„Щ…Ш§ШІ ЩҲ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШЁШҜШЈ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§ШіШ·ЩҶШЁЩҲЩ„ ЩҠЩғШӘШЁ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШіЩ„Ш§Щ… Щ„Щ„ЩӮШҜШұ. ШҘЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠЩҶЩҒШөЩ„ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮЩҮЩ…Ш§ ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ ЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ…ЩҲЩҶ ШЁШӘШӯШ¶ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ§Ш¬ШҢ ШіЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш§Щ…ШӘШӯШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШЁШұ ЩҒЩҠ ШЈШ¶ЩҶШ§. ЩҠШӘЩӮШ§Ш·Ш№ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© Щ…Ш№ Щ…Ш№ ШҜЩ…ЩҠШұ ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҮЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩ„ШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШӯЩҠШҜ Щ„ШЈШӯШҜ ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҲШ§ШҰЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұЩҠЩӮШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш«ШұЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҲЩҒШ§. Щ„ЩҠШі ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ ШҙЩҠШЎ Щ„ЩҶ ЩҠЩҒШ№Щ„ЩҮ ШҜЩ…ЩҠШұ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШӯШЁ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© ШӯШЁШ§ ШЁЩ„Ш§ ЩҮЩҲШ§ШҜШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ¬Щ„ЩҮШ§. ШҘЩҶ ЩҠЩ„Щ…Ш§ШІ ЩҲ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© ШӯШӘЩү ЩҲЩ„ЩҲ ШЈШұШ§ШҜЩҲШ§ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШ№ЩҠШҙЩҲШ§ ШӯШЁЩҮЩ… ШЁШ§Щ„ШұШәЩ… Щ…ЩҶ ЩғЩ„ ШҙЩҠШЎ ЩҒЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ№Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯЩҠШ§ЩҶ ШіШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш№Ш§ШҰЩ„Ш© ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ№Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯЩҠШ§ЩҶ ШіЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜШұ Ш№Ш§ШҰЩӮШ§ Щ„ЩҮЩ…Ш§. ШҘЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШЁ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩӮШҜ ШәЩҠШұ Ш¬ШәШұШ§ЩҒЩҠШ© ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҲЩҒШ§ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШіШ№Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 1970 ШҢ ШіЩҠШЁЩӮЩү ШұЩҮЩҠЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШіШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШәЩ„ЩӮШ© ЩҲ ШӯШұЩҲШЁ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲШ©.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рҹ‘Җ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

localized.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рҹ‘Җ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

http://www.supercell.net/parents

#clashofclans #hammerjam #seasonofupgrades

snippet.title: Emanet 149. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 149 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: MEDICO - Mamma Mia (prod. by EnelBeatz)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM PROFILI:
Medico : https://www.instagram.com/whoismedico/

Music: Medico
Text: Medico
Arrangement: EnelBeatz, Arpino Sachi
Back vocal: MaЕЎa Sitarica
Mix & Master: Arpino Sachi


Video production: Vedad Mandra | xvedmanx
Directed by: Medico, Vedad Mandra
Script: Vedad Mandra, Medico
Camera: Vedad Mandra
CC VFX Post: Vedad Mandra
Costume: Emina Tsili

TEXT

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrti se sve dharma 
mama mia

ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x2


vers1
moje sve htjele bi bit
 jer na meni samo je lagerfeld karl e 
zelja joj htjela benz
 nije ni bitno ko sjedi sa strane

moli da voli brzo da boli
moli za gole sate
prolij pa dolij 
glumi mi dolly dobro ta zna sta radi

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugi il treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

localized.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Milorad TomiДҮ - LoЕЎe je proЕЎao svako ko nije ДҮutao i trpeo Velju Nevolju! (24.3.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je Milorad TomiДҮ ToЕЎa, ДҚovek koji je prkosio momcima s vrelog asfalta. Kao mladiДҮ koji se bavio sportom poДҚeo je da radi na ulazima klubova i tako je upoznao mnoge, gotovo sve, poznate Еҫestoke momke. Svoj posao je obavljao profesionalno bez izuzetka, ne dozvoljavajuДҮi ikome da krЕЎi pravila lokala. Tamo gde je on radio ni najpoznatiji Еҫestoki momci nisu mogli da prave haos. To ga je dovodilo u teЕЎke, a nekada i po Еҫivot opasne situacije. Ipak, tvrdi da ga nikada nije zanimalo ko je ko od tih ljudi, veДҮ samo da li naruЕЎavaju red u objektu. I momci kao ЕЎto su Arkan, Zlatko BagariДҮ, Mihajlo Divac i ostali nailazili su na otpor kada bi se ponaЕЎali neprikladno. Osim u klubovima, ToЕЎa je jedno vreme bio telohranitelj Vojislava Е eЕЎelja i iz tog vremena nosi veliki broj anegdota i uspomena. O svemu ovome govori u svojim knjigama, a i ekskluzivno za gledaoce BALKAN INFO produkcije otvoreno i po prvi put govori o svojoj proЕЎlosti i raznim situacijama koje je doЕҫiveo. PreporuДҚujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate viЕЎe o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 12.03.2021. godine u naЕЎim prostorijama, u Beogradu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar PavkoviДҮ.

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i Еҫele da pomognu rad naЕЎe produkcije to mogu uДҚiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. TrudiДҮemo se da ostanemo dosledni naЕЎoj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i ЕЎirenju istine bez cenzure.

Zadnji dio puzle, tacnije price o 300ks je slozen! Za sada vise nista ne moram raditi, cak ni dizne mjenjati jer su i WRX dovoljno jake za ovaj setup. U rezervi imam i STI i dosta jace od njih, ako se odlucim da ga jos radim. Takodje tu je i pumpa goriva, ali prije toga svega, mora se uraditi motor. Mjenjac je takodje slaba karika, pa cemo vidjeti sta ce dalje biti sa Subiem, jer je trenutno na prodaju. Bacio sam oko na GTR-a, ali ako se to ne ispuni, onda cemo nastaviti raditi na Imprezi.

snippet.title: BOLJE OD Е TRUDLE - ДҢarobna posna pita sa makom, orasima i dzemom koju morate probati
snippet.description:
Verujte mi da joj naziv nije za dzabe "ДҢAROBNA PITA", toliko je ukusna da je meni bolja od ЕЎtrudle a ЕЎtrudlu oboЕҫavam. Kombinacija maka, dzema i oraha u jednom a pritom je joЕЎ i posna. Sigurna sam u to da kada jednom budete napravili ovaj kolaДҚ, recept ide u omiljene i stalno ДҮete ga praviti pa ДҚak i kada nije post. Tako fino, ukusno i meko testo bez jaja i mleka. Ja sam koristila dzem od ЕЎljiva koji se sloЕҫio u ovoj kombinaciji savrЕЎeno. InaДҚe ovo je recept naЕЎe drage blogerke SneЕҫane MarjanoviДҮ sa bloga "IZ_MOJE_KUHINJE"  A evo ga i link gde moЕҫda pronadjete joЕЎ koji recept:
http://snezamarjanovic.blogspot.com/
A moЕҫete zapratiti i SneЕҫin instagram gde objavljuje divne recepte:
https://www.instagram.com/sneza_marjanovic/?hl=en

в—Ҹ SASTOJCI ZA ДҢAROBNU PITUв—Ҹ
250 ml ДҚaja od kamilice (ja sam koristila voДҮni ДҚaj od manga i breskve)
150 ml.ulja
20 gr. kvasca,(pola kocke)
3 kaЕЎike ЕЎeДҮera,
prstohvat soli
1 kesica vanilin ЕЎeДҮera,
narendana korica od limuna,
500 gr braЕЎna Sentella tip 500 za hleb i kolaДҚe
ZA FIL:
300 gr. mlevenog maka,
3 kaЕЎike dЕҫema od ЕЎipuraka ili kajsija,
3 kaЕЎike ЕЎeДҮera,ako je smesa za ЕЎtrudle ne dodavati ЕЎeДҮer,
malo vruДҮe vode.

es.title: Mejor que el strudel. Un pastel que nos deleitГі a todos con su sabor
es.description:
CrГ©anme, su nombre no es gratis "MAGIC PIE", es tan delicioso que es mejor para mГӯ que el strudel y adoro el strudel. La combinaciГіn de semillas de amapola, mermelada y nueces en uno y al mismo tiempo tambiГ©n es magro. Estoy seguro de que una vez que hagas este pastel, la receta irГЎ a tus favoritos y lo estarГЎs preparando todo el tiempo, incluso cuando no estГ© en ayunas. Masa tan fina, sabrosa y suave sin huevos ni leche. UsГ© mermelada de ciruela que combinaba perfectamente con esta combinaciГіn. 
INGREDIENTES INGREDIENTES DE PIE
250 ml de tГ© de manzanilla (yo usГ© tГ© de mango y melocotГіn)
150 ml de aceite
20 gr. levadura (medio cubo)
3 cucharadas de azГәcar
pizca de sal
1 bolsa de azГәcar de vainilla,
ralladura de limГіn,
500 g de harina Sentella tipo 500 para pan y pasteles
PARA FIL:
300 gr. amapola molida,
3 cucharadas de mermelada de rosa mosqueta o albaricoque,
3 cucharadas de azГәcar, si la mezcla de strudel no agrega azГәcar,
un poco de agua caliente.

de.title: BESSER ALS STRUDE - Magische Torte mit Mohn, WalnГјssen und Marmelade
de.description:
Glauben Sie mir, sein Name ist nicht kostenlos "MAGIC PIE", es ist so lecker, dass es fГјr mich besser ist als Strudel und ich liebe Strudel. Die Kombination von Mohn, Marmelade und WalnГјssen in einem und gleichzeitig ist es auch mager. Ich bin mir sicher, sobald Sie diesen Kuchen gemacht haben, geht das Rezept an Ihre Favoriten und Sie werden es die ganze Zeit machen, auch wenn es nicht fastet. So feiner, leckerer und weicher Teig ohne Eier und Milch. Ich habe Pflaumenmarmelade verwendet, die perfekt zu dieser Kombination passt.
рҹ”ҠDREHEN SIE DIE ГңBERSETZUNG DURCH KOMPRESSIEREN IN DER RECHTEN ECKE CC

ZUTATENKUCHENZUTATEN
250 ml Kamillentee (ich habe Mango- und Pfirsichfruchttee verwendet)
150 ml Г–l
20 gr. Hefe (ein halber WГјrfel)
3 EsslГ¶ffel Zucker,
Prise Salz
1 Beutel Vanillezucker,
geriebene Zitronenschale,
500 g Sentella Typ 500 Mehl fГјr Brot und Kuchen
FГңR FIL:
300 gr. gemahlener Mohn,
3 EsslГ¶ffel Hagebutten- oder Aprikosenmarmelade,
3 EsslГ¶ffel Zucker, wenn die Strudelmischung keinen Zucker hinzufГјgt,
ein wenig heiГҹes Wasser.

Aluat atГўt de fin, gustos Иҷi moale, fДғrДғ ouДғ Иҷi lapte. Am folosit gem de prune care se potrivea perfect cu aceastДғ combinaИӣie.

fr.description:
Croyez-moi, son nom n'est pas gratuit "MAGIC PIE", il est tellement dГ©licieux qu'il vaut mieux pour moi que le strudel et j'adore le strudel. La combinaison de graines de pavot, de confiture et de noix en un seul et en mГӘme temps est Г©galement maigre. Je suis sГ»r quвҖҷune fois que vous aurez fait ce gГўteau, la recette ira Г  vos favoris et vous le ferez tout le temps, mГӘme si ce nвҖҷest pas Г  jeun. PГўte si fine, savoureuse et moelleuse sans Е“ufs ni lait. J'ai utilisГ© de la confiture de prune qui correspondait parfaitement Г  cette combinaison.

sk.title: LEPЕ IE AKO Е TRГҡDA - ДҢarovnГҪ kolГЎДҚ s makom, vlaЕЎskГҪmi orechmi a dЕҫemom
sk.description:
Verte mi, jeho nГЎzov nie je zadarmo вҖһMAGIC PIEвҖң, je takГҪ lahodnГҪ, Еҫe je pre mЕҲa lepЕЎГӯ ako ЕЎtrГәdДҫa a ЕЎtrГәdДҫu zboЕҫЕҲujem. KombinГЎcia maku, dЕҫemu a vlaЕЎskГҪch orechov v jednom a zГЎroveЕҲ je chudГЎ. Som si istГҪ, Еҫe akonГЎhle tento kolГЎДҚ vyrobГӯte, recept sa dostane k vaЕЎim obДҫГәbenГҪm a budete ho pripravovaЕҘ stГЎle, aj keДҸ nie je pГҙst. TakЕҫe jemnГ©, chutnГ© a mГӨkkГ© cesto bez vajec a mlieka. PouЕҫila som slivkovГҪ lekvГЎr, ktorГҪ sa k tejto kombinГЎcii dokonale hodil.

it.title: MEGLIO DELLA STRUDE - Torta magica con semi di papavero, noci e marmellata
it.description:
Credetemi, il suo nome non ГЁ gratis "MAGIC PIE", ГЁ cosГ¬ delizioso che ГЁ meglio per me dello strudel e io adoro lo strudel. La combinazione di semi di papavero, marmellata e noci in uno e allo stesso tempo risulta anche magra. Sono sicuro che una volta preparata questa torta, la ricetta va ai tuoi preferiti e la farai sempre anche quando non ГЁ a digiuno. CosГ¬ fine, gustoso e soffice impasto senza uova e latte. Ho usato marmellata di prugne che si abbinava perfettamente a questa combinazione.

pl.description:
Uwierz mi, jego nazwa nie jest darmowa "MAGIC PIE", jest tak pyszna, Ејe вҖӢвҖӢjest dla mnie lepsza niЕј strudel i uwielbiam strudel. PoЕӮД…czenie maku, dЕјemu i orzechГіw wЕӮoskich w jednym i jednoczeЕӣnie jest chude. Jestem pewien, Ејe kiedy upieksz to ciasto, przepis trafi do twoich ulubionych i bДҷdziesz go robiЕӮ przez caЕӮy czas, nawet jeЕӣli nie jest to post. Tak delikatne, smaczne i miДҷkkie ciasto bez jajek i mleka. Ja uЕјyЕӮam powideЕӮ Еӣliwkowych, ktГіre idealnie pasowaЕӮy do вҖӢвҖӢtego poЕӮД…czenia.

SKЕҒADNIK SKЕҒADNIKI SROKA
250 ml herbaty rumiankowej (ja uЕјyЕӮam herbaty owocowej z mango i brzoskwini)

snippet.description:

Tekst

Pajak:
Koj sum da vidam
Na redot li bev
Sekogash lovec ne nikogas plen
Naporno rabotam Buden do 5 
Ej ja

I vekje nisto ne e bitno
A se sto pravime e idno
Se sto pravite e isto
Mama postavav jas psiho psiho

Tasko:
Papa spremni za borba, vleguvam na bitovi,
Gladni sme kako pitovi, veruvaj ne sme pitomi,
Igrava ja pridobiv, i zemav se sto treba, 
Tamu kade sto sum jas, veruvaj vas ne ve gledam !

A ja sedaaam,
Tamu podolgo vreme, koj probal pak na tronot da sedne se zaebal pred vreme,
Vi se smeam, 
Zasto trcate po mene, dur ja trcam po nov GL Mercedes da vozam denes !

Definicija za hustla, nagrada mi e i kazna,
Ali mnogu brzo rastam, nema kasa da e prazna,
Gledaj im ja vadam masta, sakaa i da me raspnat, 
ama moze kje me zaprat, ako me staat u sandak !

Pajak:
I vekje nisto ne e bitno
A se sto pravime e idno
Se sto pravite e isto
Mama postavav jas psiho psiho

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
вҖңYou really find out whoвҖҷs there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.вҖқ
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Listen to Demi LovatoвҖҷs new song, вҖңDancing With The DevilвҖқ: https://demilovato.lnk.to/DWTD/youtubemusic
Pre-order Demi LovatoвҖҷs new album вҖҳDancing With The DevilвҖҰ The Art Of Starting OverвҖҷ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

id.title: Meraih Kekuatan Kembali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
вҖңKau akan benar-benar mengetahui siapa yang berada di sisimu ketika kehidupanmu hancur berantakan.вҖқ
Demi menjalani rehabilitasi dan memulai perjalanannya untuk pemulihan, tetapi dengan berbagai rintangan. Di saat dia kembali naik panggung untuk pertama kali sejak dirinya overdosis, dia perlu menemukan keseimbangan di dalam hidupnya.
Sumber:
Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Saluran siaga Serangan Seksual Nasional
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Atau jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:

Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741
